mapper.sql: id, user_id, education_summary, skills_json, experiences_json, certificates_json, innovation_summary, interest_summary, personality_summary, ability_score, competitiveness_score, completeness_score, resume_file_name, resume_storage_path, resume_content_type, parse_status, parse_progress, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_profiles ( user_id, education_summary, skills_json, experiences_json, certificates_json, innovation_summary, interest_summary, personality_summary, ability_score, competitiveness_score, completeness_score, resume_file_name, resume_storage_path, resume_content_type, parse_status, parse_progress ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{educationSummary}, #{skillsJson}, #{experiencesJson}, #{certificatesJson}, #{innovationSummary}, #{interestSummary}, #{personalitySummary}, #{abilityScore}, #{competitivenessScore}, #{completenessScore}, #{resumeFileName}, #{resumeStoragePath}, #{resumeContentType}, #{parseStatus}, #{parseProgress} )
mapper.update: UPDATE student_profiles SET education_summary = #{educationSummary}, skills_json = #{skillsJson}, experiences_json = #{experiencesJson}, certificates_json = #{certificatesJson}, innovation_summary = #{innovationSummary}, interest_summary = #{interestSummary}, personality_summary = #{personalitySummary}, ability_score = #{abilityScore}, competitiveness_score = #{competitivenessScore}, completeness_score = #{completenessScore}, resume_file_name = #{resumeFileName}, resume_storage_path = #{resumeStoragePath}, resume_content_type = #{resumeContentType}, parse_status = #{parseStatus}, parse_progress = #{parseProgress}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
